role_in_text: establishment of the Joint Technical Committee 3 (JTC3) on quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: The establishment of the Joint Technical Committee 3 (JTC3) on quantum technologies by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and the International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) reflects the accelerating global momentum toward international standardization of quantum technologies.

occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, it is essential to coordinate quantum technology innovation measures with strategies for other cutting-edge critical technologies—such as AI, semiconductors, biotechnology, materials, and information and communications—to advance the development and securing of technologies indispensable to Japan and foster new industries.

mentions.role_in_text: Formulated its Strategy for Creating a Quantum Future Industry
mentions.occurrence_sentence: As mentioned earlier, Japan formulated its Strategy for Creating a Quantum Future Industry in April 2023.

mentions.role_in_text: Competing in the global quantum technology market
mentions.occurrence_sentence: For Japan to compete in this global market, it is crucial to strategically collaborate with like-minded nations.

mentions.role_in_text: Policy and geopolitical actor
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Due in part to the impact of COVID-19, Japan's participation in international conferences and number of international joint research projects have been relatively low in recent years, risking reduced visibility within the global quantum community, particularly in Europe and the US.

mentions.role_in_text: Policy and geopolitical actor

mentions.role_in_text: Japan will actively utilize frameworks established in recent years with like-minded nations
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Furthermore, Japan will actively utilize frameworks established in recent years with like-minded nations, such as multilateral dialogues on quantum technology, MOCs, MOUs, the Japan-US-Korea Science and Technology Innovation Cooperation Framework, and the Japan-EU Digital Partnership, while also advancing cooperation with ASEAN.

mentions.role_in_text: hosting international conferences
mentions.occurrence_sentence: While global collaboration, such as hosting international conferences, is steadily progressing through the utilization of MOUs between Q-STAR and overseas industry associations, and between AIST and overseas research institutions, there are voices stating that Japan still lacks the necessary local information and networks required for the overseas expansion of services utilizing quantum technology.

mentions.role_in_text: Cooperating with Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs for educational programs.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: With an eye toward creating a quantum industry and cultivating researchers and engineers, the Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs, in cooperation with Q-STAR and others, will explore standard curricula targeting technical college and university students

role_in_text: public unveiling of the first domestically developed quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: In Japan, starting with the public unveiling of the first domestically developed quantum computer, "Eri," at the Quantum Computation Center (RIKEN, National Institute for Basic Biology) in March 2023, domestic companies and the Quantum Software Research Center (Osaka University) have also developed and unveiled domestic machines utilizing RIKEN's technology.

mentions.role_in_text: public unveiling of the first domestically developed quantum computer
mentions.occurrence_sentence: In Japan, starting with the public unveiling of the first domestically developed quantum computer, "Eri," at the Quantum Computation Center (RIKEN, National Institute for Basic Biology) in March 2023, domestic companies and the Quantum Software Research Center (Osaka University) have also developed and unveiled domestic machines utilizing RIKEN's technology.

mentions.role_in_text: developing and advancing foundational technologies for quantum-classical hybrid computing environments
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Therefore, at RIKEN, using a domestically developed actual machine (a superconducting quantum computer) as a test bed, we will develop and advance foundational technologies from software to hardware, as well as system software for quantum-classical hybrid computing environments.

role_in_text: compiled the strategy
occurrence_sentence: This strategy, compiled by the Quantum Technology Innovation Council, outlines the additional measures Japan must take to strengthen its position and ensure the creation and development of a quantum industry within the rapidly advancing and intensifying global competition in quantum technology.

role_in_text: participation is expanding among universities
occurrence_sentence: Regarding quantum measurement and sensing, solid-state quantum sensors, for example, offer advantages such as high-sensitivity measurement of multiple physical quantities like magnetic fields and temperature in room-temperature environments and within living organisms. Consequently, participation is expanding not only among universities and research institutions but also among companies such as automobile manufacturers.

mentions.role_in_text: participation is expanding among universities
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Regarding quantum measurement and sensing, solid-state quantum sensors, for example, offer advantages such as high-sensitivity measurement of multiple physical quantities like magnetic fields and temperature in room-temperature environments and within living organisms. Consequently, participation is expanding not only among universities and research institutions but also among companies such as automobile manufacturers.

mentions.role_in_text: collaborate to enrich opportunities for young people to encounter and learn about quantum technology
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Universities, research institutions, and industry must collaborate to enrich opportunities for young people to encounter and learn about quantum technology, from elementary and junior high school through technical colleges and universities.
